scripts.dev:local: npm run kill:ports && concurrently --kill-others --names "BE,FE,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend/nest" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix website"
scripts.dev:local:clean: npm run kill:ports && npm run build:backend && concurrently --kill-others --names "BE,FE,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "node backend/nest/dist/main.js" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix website"
scripts.test:all: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.dev:local:fresh: npm run db:setup && npm run dev:local
